title: Blockchain Consultant & Advisor
summary: Advisory and engineering across the web3 ecosystem — community tooling, proofs of concept, and protocol design — most of it taken in equity.
bullets: Built automation and bots for EthSafari and a community NFT proof of concept for MetaCamp.
Advised Alternun on tokenizing gold reserves without extracting them from the ground.
Engagements were largely equity- or token-based rather than paid.
